case_title: VIVIANE XAVIER VS. ALESSANDRA PURCINA HILL

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF XAVIER, VIVIANE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY XAVIER, VIVIANE AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, ALESSANDRA PURCINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-04-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, ALESSANDRA PURCINA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF NAD DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XAVIER, VIVIANE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HILL, ALESSANDRA PURCINA ALTHOUGH IT IS THE SELLER'S RESPONSIBILITY TO PROVIDE A SMOG CERTIFICATE AT TIME OF SALE, THE EVIDENCE ESTABLISHED THAT PLAINTIFF KNEW OR REASONABLY SHOULD HAVE KNOWN THAT THE TRUCK HAD ENGINE PROBLEMS THAT PREVENTED IT FROM PASSING A SMOG CHECK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF XAVIER, VIVIANE AS TO DEFENDANT HILL, ALESSANDRA PURCINA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
